productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Air Deschutz Black Sandal
description: It's all about exemplary comfort with the nike Air Deschutz floaters. Crafted with soft twill straps and a cushioned footbed, there's nothing that your feet have to complain about. Upper Twill straps on the forefoot, midfoot and around the ankle, with velcro closures and buckles to offer a customised Fit Fabric padding along the straps for abrasion-free comfort Haul loop at the back strap to hang the floaters from a backpack Ergonomically curved PU footbed with massage nubs for all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with strategically placed lugs for optimum grip and traction Flex grooves for ease of movement Scooped heel for cushioned comfort to the backfoot shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
